Title: Agentic Software Engineering
Text:
Discover how autonomous AI agents are revolutionizing the way we build, test, and deploy software. The definitive guide to the next era of engineering.
Experience a 37-minute deep dive into Agentic Software Engineering. This AI-generated audio summary explores the core concepts, the shift from coding to architecture, and the future of software development.
Code production isn't the bottleneck. The real challenge is complexity, communication, and maintaining system integrity over time.
Agentic Software Engineering is the discipline of ensuring reliability and trust from stochastic AI and human contributors.
Success belongs to teams who set clear intent, manage risk boundaries, and demand evidence—not just those who type fastest.
